_publications._publicationTitle: Reprogramming Captures the Genetic and Tumorigenic Properties of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 Plexiform Neurofibromas.

details: Formation of sphere-like structures visible to the naked eye, growing either attached to plate surface or as free-floating cultures resembling 3D spheroids
